subcodes.first_line: O ye dear servants of God! Your letter received and the contents proved excellent…. Truly, pure and radiant hearts are the dawning-places of the mention of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان عزیز الهی نامه رسید و مضمون بسیار موزون بود آنچه آرزوی دل شماست
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
